_comment: Shared CLIENT-SIDE chat config -- single source of truth. Imported by the Vue app (build-time) and read by api.py, which inlines the relevant slice into the barebones Wii page at serve time. NON-SECRET ONLY: secrets like API keys live server-side in api.py / .env, never here. (@l40 verbs are open on the LAN -- no sender gate.)

commands.desc: sync saved games with a console

vacuumVerbs.desc: beep so you can find it
